description: Retrieves aggregated case data grouped by types. Requires `start_date` (YYYY-MM-DD). If `end_date` is omitted, defaults to today. If both are provided, `start_date` must be <= `end_date`.

start_date.description: Start date for filtering cases (format: YYYY-MM-DD). Required.

end_date.description: End date for filtering cases (format: YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today if omitted.
